data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Spotify's interface minimizes choice overload by presenting users with categorized music options.
data.technical_spec: Intuitive navigation structure aids in quick decision-making.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are sized and positioned to ensure quick and easy access for users.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design adapts touch targets for various devices.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Grouping related items together enhances the user's ability to understand and interact with the content.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic enhancements increase user trust and satisfaction, improving perception of ease of use.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users expect consistent navigation patterns similar to other applications they use, improving learnability.
